items.title: Exploratory data analysis (EDA)
items.description: Histograms, KDE plots, and pair plots quickly reveal outliers, skew, class separation, and unexpected relationships in new tabular datasets before feature engineering or modeling.

items.title: Feature correlation analysis
items.description: Heatmaps of correlation matrices highlight redundant predictors and guide feature selection or regularization choices in linear and tree-based pipelines.

items.title: Group and A/B comparisons
items.description: Box plots, violin plots, and bar plots with error bars compare metrics— conversion rates, latency, model AUC— across segments, treatments, or model versions.

items.title: Publication-ready statistical figures
items.description: Themes, palettes, and regression plots with confidence bands produce polished charts for reports and notebooks with less styling code than raw Matplotlib.
